name: Tee'd Off Golf Simulators
address: Open daily, 2508 Wilbert Ct Suite B, Brookings, SD 57006
about: Tee'd Off Simulators is an indoor golf venue located in Brookings, SD, offering hourly simulator rentals for practice and play. The facility features multiple simulator bays with large screens displaying virtual golf courses, allowing players to enjoy golf year-round. The venue provides flexible booking options for individuals and groups, with a focus on accessible golf simulation for players of all skill levels. The facility is operated with a straightforward pricing model and emphasizes a welcoming environment for both casual players and serious golfers looking to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient indoor golf simulation accessible year-round
Flexible hourly pricing model suitable for various group sizes
Professional golf simulation technology for realistic play and practice

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on website
No mention of alcohol service on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state whether club rentals are available, so players should likely bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There's no mention of food or drink service on the website, so it's unclear if outside food and drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally speaking, one person can play 18 holes in about an hour, and a foursome can play the same in about four hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specifically mention kid-friendly amenities, but the indoor golf simulation would likely be suitable for children under proper supervision.
